item.title: Scaffold 1.1.1
item.description:
## Scaffold v1.0.4
Scaffold creates standardized project folder structures for video, motion, and design professionals — After Effects, Premiere Pro, Cinema 4D, DaVinci Resolve, Flame, Final Cut Pro, Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign.
### What's New - Full macOS native rewrite (Swift/SwiftUI) - Sidebar app icons — click to toggle any app in or out of the current project - 7-day free trial with one-click licence activation - Settings Profile export/import for sharing studio standards across machines - Duplicate Project Structure — infer app selection from an existing project folder - Float on Top window mode - Full built-in help manual (Help → Scaffold Help)
### Installation 1. Download `Scaffold-1.0.4.dmg` 2. Open the DMG and drag the **Scaffold** folder to **Applications** 3. On first launch, right-click Scaffold.app → **Open** (required once for unsigned builds)
### System Requirements - macOS 26.2 or later - Apple Silicon or Intel (via Rosetta 2)
### Notes This is an unsigned build. macOS will show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch — right-click → Open to bypass it. This will be resolved in a future signed release.
